title: A query containing a where subclause returnning true, the query result is empty.
poc: SELECT t0.c1,t1.c2 FROM t1, t0 WHERE (NOT ((t0.c1) >= (t1.c2)));
CREATE DATABASE /*!32312 IF NOT EXISTS*/ `tlp202506054` /*!40100 DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci */ /*!80016 DEFAULT ENCRYPTION='N' */;

CREATE TABLE `t1` (
`c0` float NOT NULL,
`c1` float /*!50606 COLUMN_FORMAT DYNAMIC */ DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'asdf',
`c2` varchar(500) /*!50606 STORAGE MEMORY */ DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'asdf',
PRIMARY KEY (`c0`),
UNIQUE KEY `i2` (`c2`(3) DESC,`c1`) /*!80000 INVISIBLE */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;
key_bug_features: Query with NOT condition returns empty result set
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE `t2` (`id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `value` DECIMAL(15,5) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`)) ENGINE=InnoDB;
SELECT t0.c1, t1.c2, (t0.c1) < (t1.c2), (NOT ((t0.c1) < (t1.c2))) FROM t1, t0 WHERE (t0.c1 IS NOT NULL) AND (t1.c2 IS NOT NULL);
SELECT t0.c1, t1.c2 FROM t1 JOIN t0 ON (t0.c1 < t1.c2) WHERE (NOT (t0.c1 < t1.c2));
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE value IS NULL OR value < 0;
